message:
test(conformance): add session_ops, regex_glob, string_strtok harnesses

Add conformance test harnesses for three fixture families:
- session_ops: getlogin, setsid, getsid (8 tests)
- regex_glob_ops: regcomp, regexec, fnmatch, glob (9 tests)
- string_strtok: strtok, strtok_r edge cases (8 tests)

Also includes formatting cleanup in pthread_gnu_extensions harness
and control flow improvements in conformance executor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
